# LOW / CODE Agency - Glide App Templates

> Premium Glide templates for business applications. Production-ready, customizable, and built by LOW / CODE Agency.

## What We Offer

LOW / CODE Agency provides premium Glide templates designed for real business use cases. Each template is production-ready and can be customized to fit your specific needs.

### Template Categories

- **Business Operations**: CRM, inventory management, project tracking
- **Service Business**: Field service, scheduling, client management
- **AI & Automation**: AI-powered workflows, automated processes
- **Education & Learning**: LMS, training platforms
- **Finance & Operations**: Expense tracking, asset management

## Available Templates

### Business & Operations
- **Expenses Manager** ($199) - Manage employee expenses with dashboard, approval workflows, and multi-currency support
- **Legal Case Manager** ($249) - Comprehensive legal practice management with case tracking and document management
- **Maintenance Portal** ($99) - Property and facilities maintenance management
- **Inventory Manager** ($149) - Track inventory, stock levels, and reordering

### Service & Field Operations
- **My Hotel** ($149) - Hotel management with bookings, guest management, and housekeeping
- **Construction PM** ($199) - Construction project management with timelines and resource tracking
- **Service Business Suite** ($179) - Complete service business management

### AI & Automation
- **AI Content Generator** ($129) - Generate marketing content with AI
- **AI Workflow Automation** ($149) - Automated business workflows

### Finance
- **Crypto Portfolio** ($49) - Track cryptocurrency investments
- **Investment Tracker** ($99) - Portfolio and investment management

### Education
- **Learning Platform** ($149) - LMS with course management and student tracking

### Specialty
- **Music & Media** ($79) - Media library and content management
- **Wedding Planner** ($99) - Wedding planning and vendor management
- **Real Estate CRM** ($149) - Real estate client and property management

## How It Works

1. **Browse Templates** - Explore our collection of production-ready templates
2. **Purchase** - Buy directly through Glide's template marketplace
3. **Customize** - Modify the template to fit your specific needs
4. **Deploy** - Launch your app in hours, not weeks

## Custom Development

Need something more tailored? LOW / CODE Agency offers custom Glide development services:

- Custom app development
- Integration with existing systems
- Workflow automation
- Data migration
- Training and support

Contact us at: https://www.lowcode.agency/contact

## About LOW / CODE Agency

LOW / CODE Agency is a leading Glide development agency with 40+ team members serving Fortune 500 clients. We specialize in:

- Glide app development
- Bubble development
- FlutterFlow development
- Make.com automation
- Webflow development
- Xano backend development
- AI automation for enterprises

### Why Choose Us

- **40+ team members** with deep platform expertise
- **Fortune 500 clients** trust us with their projects
- **Glide Certified Partner** with proven track record
- **Full-stack capabilities** from design to deployment
- **AI-powered solutions** for modern business needs

## Pricing & Licensing

Templates are sold through Glide's official marketplace. Each template includes:

- Lifetime access to the template
- Documentation and setup guide
- Community support through Glide
- Optional customization services available

### Pricing Range
- Simple templates: $49 - $99
- Business templates: $99 - $179
- Enterprise templates: $179 - $249

## Technical Details

### Platforms We Support
- Glide (primary)
- Bubble
- FlutterFlow
- Make.com
- Webflow
- Xano

### Integrations Available
- Google Workspace (Sheets, Drive, Calendar)
- Microsoft 365
- Slack
- Notion
- Airtable
- Custom APIs
- AI services (OpenAI, Claude)
